description: The OverlayLayer component instructs the renderer to render the hierarchy it is attached to on top of everything else. In desktop mode the component also causes the hierarchy to render directly in front of the camera, mimicking a 2D user interface.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: When enabled, OverlayLayer will tell the renderer to render the hierarchy under the slot (including the slot) on top of everything else. Internally, this is done by setting the layer of each GameObject in the hierarchy to ``Overlay``.
